scope: Lancet-tier publication readiness for cardio discovery platform

gates.label: Benchmark ingestion recall
gates.note: Requires broad live-source coverage of benchmark trial IDs.

gates.label: Ranking quality measured from non-proxy benchmark judgments
gates.note: Proxy metrics are insufficient for top-tier editorial claims.

gates.label: Provenance completeness
gates.note: Lancet-level trust requires complete traceability for displayed evidence.

gates.label: Ontology mapping coverage
gates.note: Unknown-term queue must be actively adjudicated each cycle.

gates.label: Release gate health
gates.note: Includes phase verification and strict outage/recovery checks.

gates.label: Strict live-source breadth
gates.note: Sample-only runs are not sufficient for editorial-grade external validity.

gates.label: Methodologist switch gate
gates.note: Two consecutive cycles should pass for submission-level confidence.

blockers.label: Benchmark ingestion recall
blockers.note: Requires broad live-source coverage of benchmark trial IDs.
blockers.recommendedAction: Run strict multisource ingestion against benchmark ID lists and close missing trial IDs pack-by-pack.

blockers.label: Ranking quality measured from non-proxy benchmark judgments
blockers.note: Proxy metrics are insufficient for top-tier editorial claims.
blockers.recommendedAction: Replace proxy vote-derived ranking metrics with blinded per-opportunity judgments across top-20 and compute true NDCG.

blockers.label: Provenance completeness
blockers.note: Lancet-level trust requires complete traceability for displayed evidence.
blockers.recommendedAction: Increase per-record identifiers/links (PMID/DOI/NCT and endpoint derivation paths) until completeness is 100%.

blockers.label: Strict live-source breadth
blockers.note: Sample-only runs are not sufficient for editorial-grade external validity.
blockers.recommendedAction: Use strict multisource run as the canonical editorial build and require >=4 healthy live sources.
